notes: Addresses are non-checksummed (lowercase) as pulled from Foundry broadcast file.
Ethereum accepts either checksum or lowercase form — these are valid.
Admin migration to Safe pending; to be executed via MigrateAdminToSafe.s.sol.

KommitBridge v1.2 (VPAY Genesis IP #2 — Proof of Reasoning) deployed 2026-05-12 to Polygon Mainnet at 0x6B986eF2EFDB5852F1DAa51e450E3ecA86B1590E in block 86773682 (5 atomic txs, 0.981 POL total at 408 gwei avg). Atomic admin migration to Safe + role grants to operational wallets in deploy broadcast. PROTOCOL_ID on-chain = VPAY-GENESIS-KOMMIT-v1.2. v1.2 supersedes v1.1 (0x7EA30Ea8...) with MED-3 fix: openSlashPeriod() admin function + _creditSlashRemainder() internal hook that pro-rata credits slashed-bond remainder to active period operators via MinerRewards.creditReward(). Implementation source: PR #1 on ecovent-africa/vpay-sovereign by @MukeshVermaLegit. Polygonscan source verification COMPLETE 2026-05-12 (manual forge verify-contract via Etherscan v2 unified API key): https://polygonscan.com/address/0x6b986ef2efdb5852f1daa51e450e3eca86b1590e#code. v1.1 (0x7EA30Ea8...) deprecated 2026-05-12. v1.0 (0x50D7...4c0a) deprecated 2026-04-22.

SOVVesting deployed 2026-04-22 to Polygon Mainnet at 0x452987FE45BbbF38A8cf12854F99983b549369F1. Closes Round 2 Audit HIGH-1 (founder genesis on hot key). 18,999,950 SOV (full deployer balance) bound to OZ VestingWalletCliff schedule: 12mo cliff, 4yr linear, beneficiary=Safe, irrevocable. The headline 19M minus 50 SOV operational carve-out on REASONER (0x13C6...8e92) — see sov_vesting.carveOut. Polygonscan verification still pending.
